segments: سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ كُنْتُ مَعَهُ عَلَى الْمَائِدَةِ فَنَاوَلَنِي فُجْلَةً وَ قَالَ يَا حَنَانُ كُلِ الْفُجْلَ فَإِنَّ فِيهِ ثَلَاثَ خِصَالٍ وَرَقُهُ يَطْرُدُ الرِّيَاحَ وَ لُبُّهُ يُسَرْبِلُ الْبَوْلَ وَ أَصْلُهُ يَقْطَعُ الْبَلْغَمَ .
وَ فِي رِوَايَةٍ أُخْرَى وَرَقُهُ يُمْرِئُ .
arabic.text:
سَمِعْتُ أَبَا عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) وَ كُنْتُ مَعَهُ عَلَى الْمَائِدَةِ فَنَاوَلَنِي فُجْلَةً وَ قَالَ يَا حَنَانُ كُلِ الْفُجْلَ فَإِنَّ فِيهِ ثَلَاثَ خِصَالٍ وَرَقُهُ يَطْرُدُ الرِّيَاحَ وَ لُبُّهُ يُسَرْبِلُ الْبَوْلَ وَ أَصْلُهُ يَقْطَعُ الْبَلْغَمَ .

وَ فِي رِوَايَةٍ أُخْرَى وَرَقُهُ يُمْرِئُ .

segments: Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Bundar, from his father, from Muhammad Bin Ali Al Hamdany, from Hanaan who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, and I was with him<sup>asws</sup> upon the food-spread, so he<sup>asws</sup> gave me a radish and said: ‘O Hanaan! Eat the radish for therein are three qualities – its leaf dispels the wind, and its core eases the flow of urine, and its root cuts the phlegm’.
And in another report: ‘And its leaf nourishes’.
en.hubeali.text:
Ali Bin Muhammad Bin Bundar, from his father, from Muhammad Bin Ali Al Hamdany, from Hanaan who said,

‘I heard Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup>, and I was with him<sup>asws</sup> upon the food-spread, so he<sup>asws</sup> gave me a radish and said: ‘O Hanaan! Eat the radish for therein are three qualities – its leaf dispels the wind, and its core eases the flow of urine, and its root cuts the phlegm’.

And in another report: ‘And its leaf nourishes’.

segments: 1. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Bandar from his father from Muhammad ibn Ali al-Hamadaniy from Hanan who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying; when I was with him at the table of food, he gave me a piece of radish and said, ‘O Hanan, you must eat radish because there are three qualities in it; its leaves repel gas, its essence quickens urine, and its root cuts off phlegm.’ In another Hadith it is said that its leaves make it pleasant.”
en.sarwar.text: 1. Ali ibn Muhammad ibn Bandar from his father from Muhammad ibn Ali al-Hamadaniy from Hanan who has said the following: “I once heard abu ‘ Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, saying; when I was with him at the table of food, he gave me a piece of radish and said, ‘O Hanan, you must eat radish because there are three qualities in it; its leaves repel gas, its essence quickens urine, and its root cuts off phlegm.’ In another Hadith it is said that its leaves make it pleasant.”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/217)
gradings.label: ضعيف
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (22/217)

narratorChain.raw: عَلِيُّ بْنُ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ بُنْدَارَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ عَلِيٍّ الْهَمَذَانِيِّ عَنْ حَنَانٍ قَالَ

segments: الْفُجْلُ أَصْلُهُ يَقْطَعُ الْبَلْغَمَ وَ لُبُّهُ يَهْضِمُ وَ وَرَقُهُ يَحْدِرُ الْبَوْلَ حَدْراً .
arabic.text: الْفُجْلُ أَصْلُهُ يَقْطَعُ الْبَلْغَمَ وَ لُبُّهُ يَهْضِمُ وَ وَرَقُهُ يَحْدِرُ الْبَوْلَ حَدْراً .

segments: From him, from Al Sayyari, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Ahmad Bin Al Mubarak, from Abu Usman, from Dorost,
(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The radish, its root cuts the phlegm, and its core digests, and its leaf flows the urine with a flowing’.
en.hubeali.text:
From him, from Al Sayyari, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad Bin Khalid, from Ahmad Bin Al Mubarak, from Abu Usman, from Dorost,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘The radish, its root cuts the phlegm, and its core digests, and its leaf flows the urine with a flowing’.

segments: 2. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from al-Sayyariy from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from ibn al- Mubarak from abu ‘ Uthman from Durust who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The essence, roots of radish cuts off phlegm, its core helps digest food and its leaves quicken urine fast.’”
en.sarwar.text: 2. It is narrated from the narrator of the previous Hadith from al-Sayyariy from Ahmad ibn Muhammad ibn Khalid from ibn al- Mubarak from abu ‘ Uthman from Durust who has said the following: “Abu ‘Abd Allah, ‘Alayhi al-Salam, has said, ‘The essence, roots of radish cuts off phlegm, its core helps digest food and its leaves quicken urine fast.’”

gradings.raw: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/217)
gradings.label: ضعيف
gradings.text: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/217)

narratorChain.raw: عَنْهُ عَنِ السَّيَّارِيِّ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ خَالِدٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ الْمُبَارَكِ عَنْ أَبِي عُثْمَانَ عَنْ دُرُسْتَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ( عليه السلام ) قَالَ
